faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Old Westbury typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method required. Larger estates may require additional services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Old Westbury residents in most cases. We understand that cockroach infestations require immediate attention, especially in high-end homes. Our team is familiar with Old Westbury's layout and can dispatch technicians quickly to address your pest emergency.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We offer eco-friendly treatment options specifically designed for Old Westbury's residential properties, and our technicians will provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions during and after treatment.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Old Westbury homes?
faqs.answer: Old Westbury properties most commonly encounter German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, and American cockroaches that enter from outdoors or through plumbing systems. The area's mature trees and landscaping can also attract Oriental cockroaches. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and eliminating all species common to Long Island estates and residential properties.
